title: Gastrulan
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Gastrulan.jpg]] |name=Gastrulan |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} |class=[[Gastropod/Legends|Gastropods]]{{CSWECite|I|327|Gastrula}} |subspecies= |races= |height=Approximately 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Four [[Limb/Legends|arms]], [[Eye/Legends|eyestalks]] |lifespan= |origin=[[Gastrula]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|How's it goin'?|A Gastrulan, to 42-RST|}} '''Gastrulans''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Gastropod/Legends|gastropods]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gastrula]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Standing just taller than [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]]—who averaged a height of 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]—Gastrulans sported four short [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and spotted, bulbous heads. They had [[Eye/Legends|eyestalks]] on either side of their heads, located just above the neck. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Gastrulans became the sole clients of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bungo Bung]]'s [[Great Bantha Breakfast Biscuit Run]], an endeavor to earn [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the Sullustan by selling [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s, a popular snack [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]], to those unable to obtain them. Two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the Run was established, the Gastrulans were threatened by the ravenous [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]], a mutated version of the snack that evolved when the preservatives in the biscuits came into contact with Gastrula's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. ==Biology and appearance== Gastrulans were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Gastropod/Legends|gastropods]] that stood slightly taller than a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] of average height—around 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]—and possessed four short [[Limb/Legends|arms]] attached to their torsos that ended in paddle like hands with opposable thumbs. Their heads were bulbous, with a thin mouth that stretched across their faces and slightly down their necks. Gastrulans had dark spots across the back and front of their heads, as well as down the backs of their necks. While they had no visible [[Nose/Legends|nose]] or [[Ear/Legends|ears]], they did have [[Eye/Legends|eyestalks]] that protruded from the sides of their head, near to where it joined their necks. ==Society and culture== [[File:Gastrula.jpg|thumb|right|Gastrula, homeworld of the Gastrulans]] The Gastrulans hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gastrula]], located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Gastrulans had knowledge of both clothes and weapons, as the two Gastrulans encountered by [[Bungo Bung]], a Sullustan [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], wore clothing and wielded long armed [[Pike/Legends|pikes]]. Other beings in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] were aware of the existence of the Gastrulans, and also the location of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. For their part, the Gastrulans knew of the outside galaxy, especially being aware of the popular [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] called [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s. ==History== {{Quote|How many times have you asked 'where can I get a really good Bantha Breakfast Biscuit?'''"
"''A lot, really.|42-RST and a Gastrulan|}} [[File:Gastrulans.jpg|thumb|left|Two Gastrulans]] During the Galactic Civil War, the planet Gastrula was visited by the Sullustan Captain Bungo Bung and his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[42-RST]]. They had come up with a scheme to make [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] by selling [[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]] Breakfast Biscuits, produced by the galaxy-spanning restaurant chain [[Biscuit Baron]], to those worlds that had no access to them. Upon landing in their ship, the ''[[Chubby Gundark]]'', 42-RST struck a deal with the native Gastrulans to sell them their cargo of a single box of the biscuits. Over a two-[[Standard week/Legends|week]] period, Bung and 42-RST cleared several hundred thousand credits working the route between the planets of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] and Gastrula, which they named the "[[Great Bantha Breakfast Biscuit Run]]." However, unknown to both the crew of the ''Chubby Gundark'' or the Gastrulans was the fact that the preservatives used in creating Bantha Breakfast Biscuits reacted negatively with certain environmental conditions, such as stale air and the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] present on Gastrula. These conditions caused the Bantha Breakfast Biscuits to mutate into the [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]], a ravenous amoeboid creature that set out to devour anything in its path. At least one of these creatures evolved on Gastrula, where it began eating everything it could find. ==Behind the scenes== The Gastrulans were created by [[James Anderson]] for his comic strip ''[[Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out]]'', which appeared in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|issue 11]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1996]]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I||Gastrula}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Gastrulans}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Gastropod sentient species]] [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]]
